mapper.sql: t.id, t.domain, t.short_uri AS shortUri, t.full_short_url AS fullShortUrl, t.origin_url AS originUrl, t.click_num AS clickNum, t.username, t.enable_status AS enableStatus, t.created_type AS createdType, t.valid_date_type AS validDateType, t.valid_date AS validDate, t.`describe` AS `describe`, t.favicon, t.total_pv AS totalPv, t.total_uv AS totalUv, t.total_uip AS totalUip, t.del_time AS delTime, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, t.del_flag AS delFlag
mapper.update: UPDATE t_link SET total_pv = total_pv + #{totalPv}, total_uv = total_uv + #{totalUv}, total_uip = total_uip + #{totalUip} WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND del_time = 0 AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT , COALESCE(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, COALESCE(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, COALESCE(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip FROM t_link t LEFT JOIN t_link_stats_today s ON t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url AND s.date = CURDATE() WHERE t.username = #{username} AND t.enable_status = 0 AND t.del_flag = 0 AND t.del_time = 0
ORDER BY todayPv DESC
ORDER BY todayUv DESC
ORDER BY todayUip DESC
ORDER BY t.total_pv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uip DESC
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT , COALESCE(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, COALESCE(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, COALESCE(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip FROM t_link t LEFT JOIN t_link_stats_today s ON t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url AND s.date = CURDATE() WHERE t.username = #{username} AND t.enable_status = 1 AND t.del_flag = 0 AND t.del_time = 0 ORDER by t.update_time

SELECT , COALESCE(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, COALESCE(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, COALESCE(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip FROM t_link t LEFT JOIN t_link_stats_today s ON t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url AND s.date = CURDATE() WHERE t.del_flag = 0 AND t.del_time = 0
AND t.username = #{username}
AND ( t.full_short_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.origin_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.`describe` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.total_uv
ORDER BY t.total_uip
ORDER BY t.total_pv
ORDER BY t.create_time
ASC
DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalLinks, COALESCE(SUM(total_pv), 0) AS totalClicks, COALESCE(SUM(total_uv), 0) AS totalVisitors FROM t_link WHERE del_flag = 0 AND del_time = 0
